latestComments.text: That gym really caught my eye, and I want to be a ❤️ of this lovely place.

Good afternoon

Im writing to express my disappointment regarding a recent Reformer class Media City 10-30

I had booked the class two days in advance, yet I was denied entry while participants from the waiting list were allowed in before class start.This raises a serious question about the purpose of the booking system, as confirmed bookings should be prioritized over the waiting list.

The instructor stated that bookings are canceled if a client does not arrive 5 minutes before the class, but was unable to show this rule. I also could not find such a policy on the club’s website or in the Priville app.

This situation significantly affected my impression of the club and spoiled my weekend. I am very disappointed by this experience and the lack of clear rules.

Despite being a large and expensive gym, Fitness First falls short when it comes to equipment maintenance. Key machines have been out of order for weeks and even months, with no clear solution or timeline. For a so-called premium service, the lack of care for maintenance and for members’ experience is unacceptable. Customers paying high fees deserve much better.
